steps.title: Use the emotional contrast
steps.content: The narrator and horses are afraid as wolves draw nearer, but the driver is not in the least disturbed. The word however signals an opposite emotional reaction.

steps.title: Compare the meanings
steps.content: Choice A means disorganized; Choice C means offended; Choice D means interrupted. Choice B, alarmed, names the fear or anxiety the driver does not show. The answer is B.
